headline: The Payments Game is Changing: Is Mastercard Still a Safe Bet?
summary: MA is facing new payment rails from stablecoins to AI agents, but its aggressive reinvention may keep it ahead of the disruption.

headline: Can Visa's OwlTing Partnership Accelerate Stablecoin Adoption?
summary: V deepens OwlTing ties to enable debit-funded USDC via Visa Direct, aiming to cut onboarding friction and position itself at crypto's transaction core.

headline: XLF: Strong Buy For U.S. Financials During A Multi-Year Earnings Reset
summary: XLF benefits from investment banking fee resurgence, Wells Fargo's regulatory release, and a softer regulatory environment. Read more on the XLF ETF here.

headline: RS2 CEO gives card issuing unit two years to prove fintech model works
summary: Investing.com -- RS2 Chief Executive Radi El Haj said investors should expect clear proof of a profitable card issuing business within two years, as the Maltese payments infrastructure firm tracks take rates and contribution margins to validate its push into direct competition with fintechs.

raw.headline: RS2 CEO gives card issuing unit two years to prove fintech model works
